_meta.title: Active Clinical Pipeline Counts by Drug Modality
_meta.note: Queried April 2026 using modality-specific keyword searches. Each modality queried using intervention type terms and drug class keywords. Counts represent total registered studies (all statuses) containing drugs of that modality type as an intervention.
_meta.how_to_refresh: Use ClinicalTrials.gov API v2 with intervention-type queries. Example for monoclonal antibodies: GET https://clinicaltrials.gov/api/v2/studies?query.intr=monoclonal+antibody&countTotal=true. For each modality, use the specific search terms listed in this file.

monoclonal_antibody.notes: Largest biologic category. Includes mAbs, naked antibodies, antibody fragments.

cell_therapy.notes: Broadest category — includes CAR-T, TIL, NK cells, dendritic cells, stem cells.

peptide_drug.notes: Includes GLP-1 agonists, peptide hormones, cyclic peptides.

checkpoint_inhibitor.search_term: checkpoint inhibitor OR anti-PD-1 OR anti-PD-L1 OR anti-CTLA-4
checkpoint_inhibitor.notes: PD-1/PD-L1 inhibitors dominate; newer LAG-3, TIGIT checkpoint agents growing.

gene_therapy.search_term: gene therapy OR AAV OR lentiviral vector OR adeno-associated virus
gene_therapy.notes: Includes in vivo gene delivery and ex vivo gene modification.

kinase_inhibitor.search_term: kinase inhibitor OR tyrosine kinase inhibitor OR TKI
kinase_inhibitor.notes: TKIs remain the most active small molecule oncology class.

car_t_cell.notes: Subset of cell_therapy total; CD19 and BCMA most targeted antigens.

adc.notes: Fast-growing category; HER2 and TROP2 most targeted antigens.

nk_cell_therapy.search_term: NK cell therapy OR natural killer cell

mrna_therapeutic.search_term: mRNA OR messenger RNA therapeutic OR mRNA vaccine
mrna_therapeutic.notes: Includes therapeutic mRNA and mRNA vaccines. Post-COVID platform expansion.

fusion_protein.notes: Includes Fc-fusion proteins and receptor-Ig fusion constructs.

bispecific_antibody.notes: Fastest-growing antibody sub-category. T-cell engagers dominate.

til_therapy.search_term: tumor infiltrating lymphocytes OR TIL therapy
til_therapy.notes: Growing rapidly post-Amtagvi approval (2024). Expanding to solid tumors.

antisense_oligonucleotide.notes: Mature RNA platform. GalNAc-ASO and intrathecal ASO most active.

crispr.search_term: CRISPR OR gene editing OR Cas9
crispr.notes: Mostly ex vivo hematopoietic cell editing. In vivo CRISPR in early trials.

sirna.search_term: siRNA OR small interfering RNA OR GalNAc-siRNA
sirna.notes: GalNAc-siRNA platform dominates. Liver-targeted for metabolic and rare disease.

protac_degrader.search_term: PROTAC OR protein degrader OR targeted protein degradation
protac_degrader.notes: Newest modality in trials. No approvals yet but >20 PROTACs in Phase 1-3.
